ns0:entry.ns0:title: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
Language: python
Turn any AI agent into an AI Scientist. The #1 Agent Skills library for science, used by 160,000+ scientists worldwide. 140 ready-to-use skills plus 100+ scientific databases covering biology, chemistry, medicine, and drug discovery. Compatible with Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Pi, Antigravity, and the open Agent Skills standard.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate
Language: python
Free and Open Source Machine Translation API. Self-hosted, offline capable and easy to setup.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lightricks/LTX-2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2
Language: python
Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cocoindex-io/cocoindex-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cocoindex-io/cocoindex-code
Language: python
A super light-weight embedded code search engine CLI (AST based) that just works - saves 70% token and improves speed for coding agent 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crewAIInc/crewAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI
Language: python
Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/spec-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/spec-kit
Language: python
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-research/timesfm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/timesfm
Language: python
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: livekit/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/livekit/agents
Language: python
A framework for building realtime voice AI agents 🤖🎙️📹

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/qlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/qlib
Language: python
Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: p-e-w/heretic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/p-e-w/heretic
Language: python
Fully automatic censorship removal for language models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/rf-detr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/rf-detr
Language: python
RF-DETR is a real-time object detection and segmentation model architecture developed by Roboflow, SOTA on COCO, designed for fine-tuning. [ICLR 2026]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: python
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
